caption_ref: A brightly colored modern living room featuring a yellow and green palette, a TV on a console, a dining area, and a fireplace.
A close-up image of a large brown bear resting on grass.
A cozy bedroom with a blue quilted bed, a wooden dresser, a large bookshelf, and a window overlooking greenery.
A red stop sign is prominently displayed on a metal pole in a well-maintained urban area with trees and buildings in the background.
Three brown teddy bears of different sizes cuddle together.
A person wearing a red jacket and black pants skis down a snowy slope, holding ski poles.
A kitchen setup featuring wooden cabinets, a white refrigerator, and a built-in white oven with stovetop.
A baseball player in a white uniform runs on the field, while a teammate in a green shirt holds a baseball glove.
A tennis player prepares to hit the ball on a court near a "J.P. Morgan" and "Polo" sponsor banner.
A group of children and a man gather on a tennis court, holding trophies and smiling for a photo.
A woman taking a photo of a swan on a riverbank under a bridge in a city.
A person wearing a Hello Kitty-themed phone case is holding it up, focusing on the screen.
Children are seated in a vintage-style bumper car on a track, likely enjoying a fun ride at an event or amusement setting.
A partially eaten hamburger on a plate, accompanied by a cup, is shown in black and white.
A person in a wetsuit stands on a paddleboard and paddles across calm waters, with a distant shoreline and overcast sky in the background.
A computer workstation setup includes a desktop monitor, laptop, speakers, and keyboard on a desk by a window.
A highway with directional road signs pointing to North 101, Ventura, Hollywood Blvd, and Sunset Blvd under a bridge.
A red double-decker bus with "ALDWYCH" on the sign is driving on a city street.
A black and white cat rests on top of a laptop keyboard, partially obscuring the view.
Two airplanes soar above Sydney Harbour Bridge with the iconic Sydney Opera House in the background.
A zebra nursing its calf in a natural setting.
A cozy room features a single bed with a colorful patterned cover, a round wooden table, and a chair by a window overlooking an urban stone wall.
A purple South Tyne bus marked route 96 to Metrocentre passes by a pedestrian crossing.
A bowl contains a close-up view of several shiny, unripe green apples piled together.
A batter is preparing to hit a pitch during a baseball game.
A festive table setup includes a cake with fruit toppings, cheese, grapes, and wine glasses for a celebratory meal outdoors.
A surfer paddles out in the ocean, navigating a small wave.
A group of schoolchildren, both boys and girls, are gathered in a line, posing formally in a school setting.
A rustic meal setup features grilled bread slices, a wooden-handled knife, a glass of red wine, and a white tablecloth in a cozy dining setting.
A skier jumps dramatically in mid-air against a clear blue sky, surrounded by evergreen trees.
A skier pauses atop a snowy mountain under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.
A banana and a chocolate-covered donut are partially obscured by a transparent plastic bag.
A pirate-themed mug and a kitchen knife sit on a cutting board.
People are interacting at a wine tasting event in a casual, social setting.
Two white birds stand amidst tall grass near docked fishing boats under a cloudy sky.
A man in work clothes adjusts a toilet seat while kneeling on a protective cloth, wearing gloves.
A group of skiers ascends a snow-covered mountain under a clear blue sky.
A bowl contains rice, beans, and vegetables, including broccoli, on a dark wooden table.

Bananas are stacked on a wooden surface with a computer screen and cup in the background.
A plate of mixed vegetables and chicken stir-fry with white rice is served on a decorative plate with a fork and glass of water nearby.
A young girl in a hula skirt dances joyfully in a living room where others are also enjoying casual gatherings.
A formally dressed man in a suit and tie is shaking hands with another man in a patterned shirt at a formal event.
A person wearing a light-colored shirt and a striped tie holds a drink, possibly during a casual or semi-formal gathering.
A cozy room with a plaid sofa, a plaid armchair, a small television on a stand, and a whiteboard with writing on the wall.
A surfer in a yellow jacket skillfully rides a wave on a surfboard.
A fluffy cat rests on a desk, partially obscuring a computer monitor and other office equipment.
A group of people, including children, gather around a ribbon-cutting ceremony.
